questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'MANAGER_NO' database object in an Oracle database?
questions.hint: It is used to store the manager's number for an employee.

questions.question: What happens when you insert a duplicate value into the 'MANAGER_NO' column in an Oracle database?
questions.hint: It will raise an error, as Oracle databases do not allow duplicate values.

questions.question: How does the 'MANAGER_NO' constraint in an Oracle database ensure data consistency?
questions.hint: It ensures that each employee has a unique manager, preventing orphaned employees.
